---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What's the current pain point?

## Proposed solution

How would you like this to work? If you can sketch the CLI surface, that helps:

```bash
slack-cli ...
```

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, prior art, etc.
